Dialog.name: MSG_SECRET_GATE_APPEAR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}I think something new has appeared on this floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's nothing huge, but I'll give you another heads-up when you're closer to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5008 0 0}I think this device caused that tremor just now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}The reading that I'm getting from it is similar to the one from the entrance...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The shape is similar as well. Could it[n]be a portal leading somewhere else...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I better take a closer look.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Hmm... Something seems different about this floor...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Is this clock... maybe like the one on the first floor?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a booklet in front of the clock...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The title on the cover reads,[n]"Great Clock Manual."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"For those who seek to gain greater power from a common experience..."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"To activate the Great Clock, a prerequisite quantity of Twilight Fragments is required."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"After an offering is made and the hands strike twelve, then the Great Clock can be used."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"The observer shall then reach for the pendulum while picturing a recipient of the Clock's power."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}"...Last day of the month, activity verified."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The document seems to[n]be from ten years ago.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The clock's hands are already[n]pointing at twelve...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I might as well follow the instructions[n]and picture one of my teammates...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let's try this again... Who should I think of?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_053_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Who should I think of?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Select a teammate to receive growth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Choose one more teammate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Choose two more teammates.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Choose three more teammates.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADD_EXP_CONFIRM
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}The selected teammate will gain a large amount of experience in their next battle. Proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADD_EXP_CONFIRM_YUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}Yukari Takeba will grow from {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 11}{f 0 1 27} to {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 12}{f 0 1 27} in the next battle. Confirm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADD_EXP_CONFIRM_JUNP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}Junpei Iori will grow from {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 11}{f 0 1 27} to {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 12}{f 0 1 27} in the next battle. Confirm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADD_EXP_CONFIRM_SANA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}Akihiko Sanada will grow from {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 11}{f 0 1 27} to {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 12}{f 0 1 27} in the next battle. Confirm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADD_EXP_CONFIRM_MITU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}Mitsuru Kirijo will grow from {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 11}{f 0 1 27} to {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 12}{f 0 1 27} in the next battle. Confirm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADD_EXP_CONFIRM_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}Fuuka Yamagishi will grow from {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 11}{f 0 1 27} to {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 12}{f 0 1 27} in the next battle. Confirm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADD_EXP_CONFIRM_AIGI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}Aigis will grow from {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 11}{f 0 1 27} to {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 12}{f 0 1 27} in the next battle. Confirm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADD_EXP_CONFIRM_AMAD
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}Ken Amada will grow from {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 11}{f 0 1 27} to {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 12}{f 0 1 27} in the next battle. Confirm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADD_EXP_CONFIRM_KORO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}Koromaru will grow from {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 11}{f 0 1 27} to {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 12}{f 0 1 27} in the next battle. Confirm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADD_EXP_CONFIRM_ARAG
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}Shinjiro Aragaki will grow from {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 11}{f 0 1 27} to {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 12}{f 0 1 27} in the next battle. Confirm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADD_EXP_CONFIRM_METI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}Metis will grow from {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 11}{f 0 1 27} to {f 0 1 37}level {f 2 4 12}{f 0 1 27} in the next battle. Confirm?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_PARAMETER_UP_CONFIRM
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}A teammate's stat will be increased. The boosted stat depends on the teammate, and cannot be selected by you. Proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_SIKILL_ENHANCE_CONFI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}A teammate's skill will receive enhancement. Examples include damage boosts or reduced SP costs, but the skill cannot be selected. Proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_ADD_EXP_END
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Experience bonuses have been applied to your selected teammates. Add them to your party and win a battle to finalize their gains.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_YUKARI_PARAM_UP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Yukari's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Io{f 0 1 27}, has had its Magic raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Yukari's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Isis{f 0 1 27}, has had its Magic raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Junpei's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Hermes{f 0 1 27}, has had its Strength raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Junpei's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Trismegistus{f 0 1 27}, has had its Strength raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Sanada's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Polydeuces{f 0 1 27}, has had its Agility raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Sanada's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Caesar{f 0 1 27}, has had its Agility raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Mitsuru's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Penthesilea{f 0 1 27}, has had its Magic raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Mitsuru's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Artemisia{f 0 1 27}, has had its Magic raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Fuuka's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Lucia{f 0 1 27}, has had its Luck raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Fuuka's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Juno{f 0 1 27}, has had its Luck raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Aigis's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Palladion{f 0 1 27}, has had its Strength raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Aigis's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Athena{f 0 1 27}, has had its Strength raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Amada's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Nemesis{f 0 1 27}, has had its Magic raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Amada's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Kala-Nemi{f 0 1 27}, has had its Magic raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Koromaru's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Cerberus{f 0 1 27}, has had its Agility raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Koromaru's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Cerberus{f 0 1 27}, has had its Agility raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Aragaki's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Castor{f 0 1 27}, has had its Agility raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Aragaki's Persona, {f 0 1 35}Castor{f 0 1 27}, has had its Agility raised by {f 2 4 0}.[n]{f 1 1}
